message:
feat(update): Add version check caching and improved backup management

Implement 24-hour caching for GitHub version checks to reduce API calls
and improve startup performance. The cache is stored in the user's
cache directory and automatically invalidated after CACHE_DURATION.

Add spawn_update_check_if_needed() for background cache refresh during
startup without blocking the main thread. Respects RCH_NO_UPDATE_CHECK
environment variable.

Enhance backup system with metadata tracking:
- BackupEntry records version, timestamp, and paths
- create_backup() writes backup.json metadata alongside files
- find_backup_by_version() enables targeted rollbacks
- Automatic pruning to MAX_BACKUPS entries
- Version-aware rollback messages

The rollback command now accepts optional target_version parameter
for rolling back to a specific version instead of just the latest.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
